# Sediment Transport

**Summary**: The movement of solid particles (sand) by the flow of fluids.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-suleiman|Suleiman, 2019]] modeled sand transport using an advection-diffusion equation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-suleiman|Suleiman, 2019]] Determines the amount of sand reaching surface facilities.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-suleiman|Suleiman, 2019]] Solved via advection-diffusion equations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Sand concentration is very low and decreases over time, suggesting minimal need for surface sand control equipment. ([[2019-suleiman|Suleiman, 2019, p. 69]])
- [[2019-suleiman|Suleiman, 2019]] Concentration is low and decreases over time.
